'''Cathea''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] whose parents went to [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] as "[[Slavery/Legends|pilgrims]]" with her. During the [[Battle of Ylesia]], which took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Cathea and other children such as [[Kryss P'teska]], [[Aeron]] and [[Tym]] were abandoned by their parents, who had been enthralled by the [[Exultation]]. Cathea and the children hid together in a basement and were eventually found by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] after the raid.<ref name="RD" />

Since demolition bombs were set to level the building within a matter of minutes, the rescuers had no other option but to take the children with them. Although Solo intended to drop the children off at the next [[spaceport]], Chewbacca advocated for taking them to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="RD" />

While bringing a load of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] from [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] on orders from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], the group was discovered by an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial patrol]]. Cathea and three of the other children helped Solo jettison the illegal cargo in order to evade arrest. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] convinced the Imperials that he was taking the children to Corellia. As the Captain [[Tybert Capucot]] insisted to escort them, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] dropped the children off at Corellia, thus returning Cathea back to her home planet.<ref name="RD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
